title: FDIC Insured Bank Lookup
description: Search FDIC-insured banking institutions by US state and return name, city, state and total assets. Data from the FDIC BankFind API.
descriptionBazaar: Look up FDIC-insured banks by US state. Returns institution name, city, state and total assets (USD thousands) for each bank. Official FDIC BankFind data, refreshed daily. Useful for bank due-diligence, market mapping and financial research.

filters.description: FDIC filter expression, e.g. STALP:CA for California banks

title: Federal Register Document Detail
description: Full metadata for a single Federal Register document by its document number (title, agencies, action, dates). Data from the Federal Register API.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch full metadata for one Federal Register document by document number: title, abstract, action, publishing agencies and effective dates. Official US Federal Register API. Useful for tracking specific rules, notices and presidential documents.

title: Federal Register Public Inspection (Today)
description: Documents currently on public inspection at the Federal Register, before official publication. Data from the Federal Register API.
descriptionBazaar: List documents currently on public inspection at the US Federal Register (filed but not yet officially published). Returns agencies, titles and document numbers. Official Federal Register API. Useful for early-warning regulatory and civic monitoring.

title: CourtListener Courts Directory
description: Directory of US courts by jurisdiction (federal, state) with id, name and citation string. Data from the CourtListener REST API.
descriptionBazaar: List US courts by jurisdiction (F=federal, S=state) from CourtListener. Returns court id, full name, short name, citation string and in-use status. Official CourtListener REST API, keyless read access. Useful for legal-data integrations and court reference lookups.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction filter, e.g. F (federal) or S (state)

title: Art Institute of Chicago Artwork Detail
description: Returns full catalog detail for a single Art Institute of Chicago artwork by its numeric ID, including title, artist, date, and medium. Source: api.artic.edu.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch one Art Institute of Chicago artwork by numeric ID. Returns title, artist_title, date_display, medium_display and more from the museum's open collection API. Keyless. Good for enriching art references or building gallery datasets.

id.description: Art Institute of Chicago artwork numeric ID

data.title: A Sunday on La Grande Jatte - 1884

title: Art Institute of Chicago Exhibitions
description: Returns a paginated list of past and present exhibitions at the Art Institute of Chicago. Source: api.artic.edu.
descriptionBazaar: List exhibitions at the Art Institute of Chicago with pagination. Returns exhibition titles and IDs. Keyless open-access museum API. Useful for cultural calendars and museum-content datasets.

title: Project Gutenberg Book Search
description: Searches the Project Gutenberg catalog by author or title text and returns matching public-domain books with authors and download counts. Source: gutendex.com.
descriptionBazaar: Search the Project Gutenberg free ebook catalog by author or title via Gutendex. Returns matching books with title, authors, languages and download_count. Keyless. Useful for public-domain book discovery and reading-list datasets.

title: PoetryDB Poems By Author
description: Returns the list of poem titles by a given author in the PoetryDB classic-poetry database. Source: poetrydb.org.
descriptionBazaar: List all poem titles by a poet (e.g. Emily Dickinson) from PoetryDB, a database of classic public-domain poetry. Returns an array of titles. Keyless. Useful for browsing a poet's catalog before fetching full text.

title: MusicBrainz Artist Search
description: Searches the MusicBrainz open music database for artists by name and returns ranked matches with type, country, and MBID. Source: musicbrainz.org.
descriptionBazaar: Search MusicBrainz for music artists by name. Returns ranked matches with name, type (Group/Person), country, score and MBID. Keyless (sends a User-Agent). Useful for resolving artist names to canonical MusicBrainz IDs.

title: ZenQuotes Random Inspirational Quote
description: Returns a random inspirational quote with its author from the ZenQuotes service. Source: zenquotes.io.
descriptionBazaar: Get a random inspirational quote with author attribution from ZenQuotes. Returns the quote text and author. Keyless, no parameters. Useful for daily-quote widgets, prompts, and motivational content.

sampleResponse.q: Getting lost along your path is a part of finding the path you are meant to be on.

title: USGS Earthquake Event Feed
description: Returns recent earthquakes as GeoJSON from the USGS FDSN event service, filterable by time window and minimum magnitude.
descriptionBazaar: Live earthquake feed from USGS (FDSN). Query by start/end date and minimum magnitude; returns GeoJSON features with magnitude, place, time and coordinates. Keyless, authoritative seismic data for monitoring, alerting and research.

title: NASA POWER Daily Climate Point
description: Returns daily climate parameters (e.g. 2m temperature, corrected precipitation) for a lat/lng point from the NASA POWER project, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Daily climate data for any coordinate from NASA POWER. Specify parameters (temperature, precipitation), a community and a date range to get a per-day series. Keyless, satellite-derived. Great for agriculture, renewable energy and climate analytics.

title: Current Air Quality by Coordinate
description: Returns current air quality at a lat/lng point from Open-Meteo, including PM10, PM2.5, carbon monoxide and ozone concentrations, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Current air quality for any coordinate from Open-Meteo. Returns PM2.5, PM10, carbon monoxide and ozone with units. Keyless, global coverage. Useful for health, outdoor activity and environmental dashboards.

title: River Discharge Flood Forecast
description: Returns daily river discharge forecast at a lat/lng point from the Open-Meteo Flood API (GloFAS), as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Daily river discharge forecast for any coordinate from Open-Meteo's GloFAS-based flood API. Returns a multi-day discharge series in m3/s. Keyless, global. Useful for flood risk monitoring and hydrology agents.

title: Ocean Wave Conditions Forecast
description: Returns hourly wave height, direction and period at a coastal lat/lng point from the Open-Meteo Marine API, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Hourly ocean wave forecast for any coastal coordinate from Open-Meteo Marine. Returns wave height (m), direction and period. Keyless, global. Useful for marine ops, surf, shipping and coastal safety agents.

title: Sunrise, Sunset and Daylight Duration
description: Returns daily sunrise, sunset and daylight duration for a lat/lng point from the Open-Meteo forecast API, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Daily sunrise, sunset and daylight-duration series for any coordinate from Open-Meteo. Time-zone aware. Keyless, global. Useful for solar, scheduling, photography and astronomy agents.

title: GBIF Species Name Search
description: Searches the GBIF taxonomic backbone for species matching a free-text query and returns matching taxa as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Search GBIF's global taxonomic backbone by free-text name to resolve species, get taxonomy and keys. Keyless. Foundation for biodiversity lookups, name resolution and occurrence joins.

title: US ZIP Code Lookup
description: Returns the city, state, and lat/long coordinates for a US ZIP code via the keyless Zippopotam.us postal API.
descriptionBazaar: Resolve any US ZIP code to its place name, state, and geographic coordinates. Backed by the free Zippopotam.us postal database. Pass a 5-digit ZIP and get back city, state abbreviation, latitude, and longitude.

title: Place Name Geocoding
description: Geocodes a free-text place or address query to coordinates and OSM metadata via the keyless Nominatim search API.
descriptionBazaar: Geocode any free-text place name or address to latitude/longitude with OpenStreetMap detail (type, class, importance, display name). Pass a query string, get back candidate matches. Backed by Nominatim/OSM.

title: US Address to Census Geographies
description: Returns the Census tract, block, county, and state geographies for a US address via the keyless US Census Bureau geocoder.
descriptionBazaar: Map a US street address to its official Census geographies: state, county, tract, and block FIPS codes plus names. Essential for demographic joins and redistricting. US Census Bureau geocoder, no key needed.

title: IP Geolocation Detail
description: Returns country, region, city, ISP, org, and coordinates for an IP address via the keyless ip-api.com service.
descriptionBazaar: Geolocate any IPv4/IPv6 address to country, region, city, ZIP, timezone, ISP, organization, AS number, and coordinates. Pass an IP, get a full geo profile. Free ip-api.com, no key required.

title: Aircraft Registry Lookup
description: Returns the registration, manufacturer, type, and owner for an aircraft by ICAO Mode-S hex via the keyless hexdb.io database.
descriptionBazaar: Resolve an aircraft's 24-bit ICAO Mode-S hex to its registration, manufacturer, ICAO type code, full type name, and registered owner/operator. Free hexdb.io registry, no key. Pass a Mode-S hex like 4CA7B5.

title: Country Capitals Directory
description: Returns the capital city and ISO codes for every country via the keyless countriesnow.space API.
descriptionBazaar: Get a complete directory of all countries with their capital cities and ISO2/ISO3 codes. Single call returns the full list. Free countriesnow.space data, no key required. Ideal for reference tables and enrichment.

title: Pokemon Pokedex Lookup
description: Returns full Pokedex data for a Pokemon by name or id (types, height, weight, base stats, abilities) from PokeAPI.
descriptionBazaar: Look up any Pokemon by name or id and get its Pokedex profile: national id, types, height, weight, base experience and abilities. Backed by PokeAPI, the canonical free Pokemon dataset. Pass a name like charizard or a numeric id.

title: Pokemon TCG Card Search
description: Searches Pokemon Trading Card Game cards by name and returns matching card metadata (set, rarity, supertype) from the Pokemon TCG API.
descriptionBazaar: Search the Pokemon Trading Card Game database by card name and get matching cards with set name, rarity and supertype. Backed by the keyless Pokemon TCG API. Pass a Lucene-style query like name:charizard.

title: Rick and Morty Character
description: Returns a Rick and Morty character by id (name, status, species, gender, origin) from the Rick and Morty API.
descriptionBazaar: Look up a Rick and Morty character by numeric id and get name, status, species, gender and origin planet. Backed by the keyless Rick and Morty API. Pass a character id like 1 for Rick Sanchez.

title: Anime Detail by MAL ID
description: Returns full anime details by MyAnimeList id (title, type, episodes, score, year) via the keyless Jikan v4 API.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch full anime details by MyAnimeList id: title, type, episode count, community score and broadcast year. Backed by the keyless Jikan v4 API (MyAnimeList). Pass a MAL anime id like 1 for Cowboy Bebop.

title: Trivia Question Bank
description: Returns a batch of multiple-choice trivia questions for a chosen category from the Open Trivia Database.
descriptionBazaar: Pull a batch of trivia questions (with category, difficulty, type and the question text) from the Open Trivia Database. Keyless and high-volume. Pass a category id (e.g. 9 = General Knowledge); amount defaults to 5.

results.question: Which canal connects the Mediterranean Sea with the Red Sea?

title: xkcd Comic Metadata
description: Returns metadata for an xkcd comic by number (title, date, alt text, image URL) from xkcd.com.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch the metadata of any xkcd webcomic by its number: title, publication date, alt text and image URL. Backed by the keyless xkcd JSON API. Pass a comic number like 614.

title: All FX Rates For A Base Currency
description: Returns daily exchange rates from one base currency to ~160 world currencies. Source: open.er-api.com (ExchangeRate-API free, keyless).
descriptionBazaar: Live conversion table from a base currency (e.g. USD) to ~160 fiat currencies in one call. Includes last-update timestamps. Source: open.er-api.com / ExchangeRate-API free tier. Pass any ISO 4217 base code as the path param.

title: GDP Deflator Inflation By Country
description: Annual GDP-deflator inflation rate (%) for a country over a year range. Indicator NY.GDP.DEFL.KD.ZG. Source: World Bank Open Data, keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Annual inflation measured by the GDP deflator (% per year) for any country/year range. World Bank indicator NY.GDP.DEFL.KD.ZG. Pass ISO country code (path) plus optional date range. A broad alternative to CPI inflation.

title: US Treasury Interest Expense On Debt
description: Monthly interest expense on the US public debt by security type. Source: US Treasury FiscalData API, keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Monthly and fiscal-year-to-date interest expense on US Treasury debt, broken out by security type (bills, notes, bonds, etc). Source: US Treasury FiscalData. Sorted newest first; trim page size as needed.

title: Breweries By State
description: List of breweries in a given US state with type, address, and geo coordinates. Source: Open Brewery DB, keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Directory of breweries in a US state: name, brewery type (micro, brewpub, regional...), full address, phone, website, and lat/long. Source: Open Brewery DB. Pass by_state (use full state name, e.g. ohio) and optional per_page.

title: FDIC Bank Financials
description: Quarterly financial metrics (assets, deposits) for FDIC-insured banks filtered by state. Data from the FDIC BankFind financials API.
descriptionBazaar: Retrieve quarterly bank financial metrics (total assets, deposits) for FDIC-insured institutions by state filter. Returns time-series rows keyed by cert and report date. Official FDIC data for financial analysis and bank monitoring.

title: Federal Register Term Search
description: Search Federal Register documents by free-text term and return matching rules, notices and proposed rules. Data from the Federal Register API.
descriptionBazaar: Full-text search of US Federal Register documents by term. Returns matching titles, document types, abstracts and document numbers with a total count. Official Federal Register API. Ideal for regulatory monitoring on any topic or keyword.

title: CourtListener Court Detail
description: Full detail for a single US court by its court id (name, citation string, dates, scrapers). Data from the CourtListener REST API.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch full detail for one US court by court id (e.g. scotus) from CourtListener: full and short names, citation string, position, in-use status and scraper flags. Official CourtListener REST API, keyless read access. Useful for legal-data lookups.

title: Art Institute of Chicago Artwork Search
description: Full-text search over the Art Institute of Chicago collection, returning matching artworks ranked by relevance. Source: api.artic.edu.
descriptionBazaar: Search the Art Institute of Chicago collection by free-text query (artist, title, keyword). Returns ranked matches with artwork IDs and titles. Keyless museum open-access API. Useful for finding artworks before fetching full detail.

title: Met Museum Departments
description: Returns the full list of curatorial departments at the Metropolitan Museum of Art with IDs and display names. Source: collectionapi.metmuseum.org.
descriptionBazaar: List all curatorial departments at the Metropolitan Museum of Art with departmentId and displayName. Keyless open-access museum API. Useful as a lookup for filtering Met object searches by department.

title: Project Gutenberg Book Detail
description: Returns full metadata for one Project Gutenberg book by its numeric ID, including title, authors, subjects, and download links. Source: gutendex.com.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch one Project Gutenberg book by its numeric ID via Gutendex. Returns title, authors, subjects, languages, formats and download_count. Keyless. Useful for resolving a Gutenberg ID to full book metadata and download URLs.

title: PoetryDB Poem By Title
description: Returns the full text and metadata of a poem matching the given title from the PoetryDB classic-poetry database. Source: poetrydb.org.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch a classic public-domain poem by title from PoetryDB. Returns title, author, line count and full lines. Keyless. Useful for retrieving poetry text for analysis, display, or literary datasets.

sampleResponse.title: Ozymandias
sampleResponse.author: Percy Bysshe Shelley
lines: I met a traveller from an antique land
Who said: Two vast and trunkless legs of stone

title: MusicBrainz Release Group Search
description: Searches the MusicBrainz open music database for release groups (albums/singles) by title and returns ranked matches. Source: musicbrainz.org.
descriptionBazaar: Search MusicBrainz for release groups (albums, singles, EPs) by title. Returns matches with title, primary-type, artist credit and MBID. Keyless (sends a User-Agent). Useful for finding canonical album entries in the open music database.

title: ZenQuotes Quote Of The Day
description: Returns the daily quote of the day with its author from the ZenQuotes service. Source: zenquotes.io.
descriptionBazaar: Get the ZenQuotes quote of the day with author attribution. Returns the day's quote text, author and an image link. Keyless, no parameters. Useful for daily-content feeds and quote-of-the-day features.

sampleResponse.q: Let us rather run the risk of wearing out than rusting out.

title: USGS Earthquakes Near a Location
description: Returns earthquakes within a radius of a lat/lng point from the USGS FDSN service as GeoJSON, filterable by minimum magnitude and start time.
descriptionBazaar: Find earthquakes near any point. Pass latitude, longitude and a search radius (km) plus minimum magnitude and start date; returns GeoJSON quake features from USGS. Keyless. Ideal for location-aware seismic risk checks.

title: NASA POWER Monthly Climate Point
description: Returns monthly climate parameters for a lat/lng point across one or more years from NASA POWER, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Monthly climate aggregates for any coordinate from NASA POWER. Specify parameters, community and a start/end year to get month-by-month values. Keyless, satellite-derived climate normals for planning and seasonal analysis.

title: Air Quality Index (US and European)
description: Returns the current US AQI and European AQI plus PM2.5 and PM10 at a lat/lng point from Open-Meteo, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Current US and European AQI for any coordinate from Open-Meteo, alongside PM2.5 and PM10 concentrations. Keyless, global. Ideal for surfacing a single human-readable air quality score in apps and agents.

title: Peak River Discharge Outlook
description: Returns daily maximum river discharge for an extended forecast horizon at a lat/lng point from Open-Meteo Flood (GloFAS), as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Extended peak river discharge outlook for any coordinate from Open-Meteo's flood API. Returns up to 30 days of daily maximum discharge (m3/s). Keyless, global. Built for early flood-risk and basin-stress signals.

title: Sea Surface Temperature and Current
description: Returns current sea surface temperature and ocean current velocity at a lat/lng point from the Open-Meteo Marine API, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Current sea surface temperature and ocean current velocity for any marine coordinate from Open-Meteo. Keyless, global. Useful for fisheries, climate, reef monitoring and maritime routing.

title: Daily UV Index and Sunshine Forecast
description: Returns daily maximum UV index and sunshine duration for a lat/lng point from the Open-Meteo forecast API, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Daily max UV index and sunshine-duration forecast for any coordinate from Open-Meteo. Keyless, global, time-zone aware. Useful for sun-safety, solar yield and outdoor-planning agents.

title: GBIF Species Name Match
description: Matches a scientific name against the GBIF backbone and returns the accepted taxon with full classification, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Resolve a scientific name to its accepted GBIF taxon with confidence, rank and full kingdom-to-genus classification. Keyless. Best for normalizing species names before analysis or display.

title: International Postal Code Lookup
description: Returns place name, region, and coordinates for a postal code in a given country (DE, GB, CA, NL, ES, and more) via keyless Zippopotam.us.
descriptionBazaar: Look up any postal code worldwide by 2-letter country code. Returns place name, state/region, latitude, and longitude. Covers Germany, UK, Canada, Netherlands, Spain and dozens more countries. Free Zippopotam.us data.

title: Reverse Geocoding
description: Reverse-geocodes a latitude/longitude to the nearest place or address via the keyless Nominatim reverse API.
descriptionBazaar: Turn coordinates into an address. Pass lat and lon and get the nearest OpenStreetMap feature with display name, type, and address components. Backed by Nominatim/OSM, free and keyless.

title: US Coordinates to Census Geographies
description: Returns the Census state, county, and tract geographies for a coordinate pair via the keyless US Census Bureau geocoder.
descriptionBazaar: Reverse-map a US latitude/longitude to its official Census geographies (state, county, tract FIPS codes and names). Pass x (lon) and y (lat). Authoritative US Census Bureau geocoder, no key required.

title: Airport Lookup by ICAO
description: Returns the airport name, IATA/ICAO codes, country, region, and coordinates for an ICAO airport code via the keyless hexdb.io database.
descriptionBazaar: Look up an airport by its 4-letter ICAO code and get the airport name, IATA code, country, region, and latitude/longitude. Free hexdb.io airport database, no key. Pass an ICAO like EGLL.

title: States and Provinces by Country
description: Returns the list of states/provinces with codes for a given country via the keyless countriesnow.space API.
descriptionBazaar: Given a country name, return its full list of states or provinces with their subdivision codes. Free countriesnow.space data, no key. Useful for address forms, dropdowns, and geographic enrichment.

title: Pokemon Type Matchups
description: Returns damage relations and member Pokemon for an elemental type from PokeAPI.
descriptionBazaar: Get the battle matchup chart for any Pokemon elemental type: which types deal double, half, or no damage to it, plus the count of Pokemon that have the type. Useful for team-building and battle logic. Backed by PokeAPI.

title: Magic The Gathering Card Search
description: Searches Magic: The Gathering cards by name and returns matching card data (mana cost, type, rarity, set) from the magicthegathering.io API.
descriptionBazaar: Search Magic: The Gathering cards by name and get mana cost, card type, rarity and set name for each match. Backed by the keyless magicthegathering.io API. Pass a card name like Black Lotus.

title: Rick and Morty Location
description: Returns a Rick and Morty location by id (name, type, dimension, resident count) from the Rick and Morty API.
descriptionBazaar: Look up a Rick and Morty location by numeric id and get its name, type, dimension and number of residents. Backed by the keyless Rick and Morty API. Pass a location id like 1.

title: Manga Detail by MAL ID
description: Returns manga details by MyAnimeList id (title, type, chapters, score) via the keyless Jikan v4 API.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch manga details by MyAnimeList id: title, type, chapter count and community score. Backed by the keyless Jikan v4 API (MyAnimeList). Pass a MAL manga id like 1 for Monster.

title: Trivia Quiz Questions
description: Random multiple-choice trivia questions with answers, category, and difficulty. Source: Open Trivia Database (opentdb.com), keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch a batch of random trivia questions (multiple choice) with the correct answer, distractors, category, and difficulty. Source: Open Trivia Database. Pass amount and optional type/difficulty query params.

results.question: Which small country is located between the borders of France and Spain?

title: Latest FX Rate For A Currency Pair
description: Latest ECB reference exchange rate from a base currency to one or more target currencies. Source: Frankfurter (frankfurter.dev), ECB data, keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Latest European Central Bank reference rates from a base currency to selected targets (comma-separated). Pass base and symbols as query params. Source: Frankfurter / ECB. Good for clean, citable, official daily FX.

title: Lending Interest Rate By Country
description: Annual bank lending interest rate (%) for a country over a year range. Indicator FR.INR.LEND. Source: World Bank Open Data, keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Annual lending interest rate (% charged by banks to the private sector) for any country/year range. World Bank indicator FR.INR.LEND. Pass ISO country code (path) plus optional date range.

title: US Treasury Rates Of Exchange
description: Official quarterly Treasury Reporting Rates of Exchange (foreign currency per USD) used by US agencies. Source: US Treasury FiscalData API, keyless.
descriptionBazaar: The official US Treasury Reporting Rates of Exchange used by federal agencies to convert foreign currency balances to USD, by country and currency. Source: US Treasury FiscalData. Sorted newest first; trim page size as needed.

title: Brewery Name Search
description: Free-text search for breweries by name, returning matches with type, address, and geo coordinates. Source: Open Brewery DB, keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Search breweries by free-text query (matches name) and get back type, address, contact, and lat/long for each hit. Source: Open Brewery DB. Pass a query string in the q param.

title: FDIC Bank Branch Locations
description: Bank branch locations (name, city, street address) for FDIC-insured institutions filtered by state. Data from the FDIC BankFind locations API.
descriptionBazaar: Find FDIC-insured bank branch locations by state. Returns branch name, city and street address. Official FDIC BankFind locations data, refreshed daily. Useful for branch mapping, market presence and geographic banking analysis.

title: Federal Register Executive Orders
description: List recent US Executive Orders published in the Federal Register with titles and document numbers. Data from the Federal Register API.
descriptionBazaar: Retrieve the latest US Executive Orders from the Federal Register, with title, document number, abstract and publication date. Official Federal Register API filtered to presidential document type executive_order. Useful for policy tracking and civic monitoring.

sampleResponse.description: Documents of presidential document type Executive Order

title: Art Institute of Chicago Artist Detail
description: Returns biographical detail for a single Art Institute of Chicago artist/agent by numeric ID, including name, birth and death dates. Source: api.artic.edu.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch one artist record from the Art Institute of Chicago by numeric agent ID. Returns name, birth_date, death_date and alt titles. Keyless open-access API. Useful for enriching art and biography datasets.

id.description: Art Institute of Chicago artist/agent numeric ID

title: Met Museum Object Search
description: Searches the Metropolitan Museum of Art collection by free-text query and returns matching object IDs. Source: collectionapi.metmuseum.org.
descriptionBazaar: Search the Metropolitan Museum of Art collection by free-text query, optionally only objects with images. Returns total count and a list of matching objectIDs to resolve to full records. Keyless museum API.

title: Project Gutenberg Books By Language
description: Returns popular Project Gutenberg public-domain books filtered by language code, sorted by popularity. Source: gutendex.com.
descriptionBazaar: List Project Gutenberg books filtered by language (ISO code, e.g. fr, de, es) and sorted by popularity via Gutendex. Returns count and matching books. Keyless. Useful for building multilingual public-domain reading datasets.

results.title: Les mille et une nuits, tome premier

title: PoetryDB Authors List
description: Returns the full list of poets available in the PoetryDB classic-poetry database. Source: poetrydb.org.
descriptionBazaar: List every poet available in PoetryDB, a database of classic public-domain poetry. Returns an array of author names. Keyless, no parameters. Useful as a directory before querying poems by a specific author.

title: MusicBrainz Recording Search
description: Searches the MusicBrainz open music database for recordings (tracks) by title and returns ranked matches with length and artist. Source: musicbrainz.org.
descriptionBazaar: Search MusicBrainz for recordings (tracks) by title. Returns matches with title, length (ms), artist credit and MBID. Keyless (sends a User-Agent). Useful for resolving song titles to canonical recordings.

title: FavQs Quote Of The Day
description: Returns the FavQs quote of the day with author and topic tags. Source: favqs.com.
descriptionBazaar: Get the FavQs quote of the day. Returns quote body, author, topic tags and a URL. Keyless, no parameters. Useful for daily-quote feeds with categorization tags.

quote.body: Keep your face to the sunshine and you cannot see the shadow.
quote.author: Helen Keller

title: USGS Stream Gage Instantaneous Flow
description: Returns instantaneous streamflow/discharge time series for a USGS NWIS monitoring site over a recent period, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Real-time river discharge from a USGS stream gage. Pass an NWIS site number and a period (ISO 8601 duration) to get instantaneous flow (parameter 00060) values. Keyless USGS Water Services data for hydrology and flood monitoring.

title: NASA POWER Climatology Normals
description: Returns long-term monthly and annual climatology normals for a point from NASA POWER, e.g. surface solar irradiance, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Climatology normals for any coordinate from NASA POWER. Get long-term monthly and annual averages (e.g. all-sky solar irradiance) for a single lat/lng. Keyless. Ideal for solar siting, agriculture and baseline climate comparison.

title: GBIF Occurrence Records Search
description: Searches GBIF occurrence records by scientific name and returns georeferenced observation/specimen records as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Search GBIF's billions of occurrence records by scientific name to get georeferenced sightings and specimens with dataset provenance. Keyless. Powers range maps, presence checks and biodiversity analytics.

title: US City to ZIP Codes
description: Returns all ZIP codes and coordinates for a US city within a given state via the keyless Zippopotam.us API.
descriptionBazaar: Given a US state code and a city name, return every ZIP code in that city with coordinates. Useful for territory mapping and address validation. Free Zippopotam.us postal data.

title: City Search and Coordinates
description: Searches cities by name and returns coordinates, country, timezone, elevation, and population via the keyless Open-Meteo geocoding API.
descriptionBazaar: Search for a city or town by name and get back matching places with coordinates, country code, timezone, elevation, and population. Pass a name (and optional count), get structured results. Free Open-Meteo geocoding.

title: FCC Census Block Lookup
description: Returns the Census block, county, and state FIPS codes for a coordinate pair via the keyless FCC block-find API.
descriptionBazaar: Resolve any US latitude/longitude to its 15-digit Census block FIPS, county, and state. Lightweight and fast, the FCC block API is the standard tool for assigning points to Census geographies. Keyless and free.

title: Flight Route by Callsign
description: Returns the origin-destination airport route for a flight callsign via the keyless hexdb.io route database.
descriptionBazaar: Resolve a flight callsign to its scheduled origin-destination airport route (ICAO pair) with last-updated timestamp. Free hexdb.io route database, no key. Pass a callsign like BAW123 to get its route.

title: Pokemon Ability Lookup
description: Returns details about a Pokemon ability including its effect from PokeAPI.
descriptionBazaar: Look up a Pokemon ability by name and get its id, main-series flag and effect description. Backed by PokeAPI. Pass an ability slug like blaze or overgrow.

title: Rick and Morty Episode
description: Returns a Rick and Morty episode by id (name, air date, episode code, character count) from the Rick and Morty API.
descriptionBazaar: Look up a Rick and Morty episode by numeric id and get its title, air date, season/episode code and the count of featured characters. Backed by the keyless Rick and Morty API. Pass an episode id like 1.

title: Anime Character Detail by MAL ID
description: Returns anime/manga character details by MyAnimeList id (name, favorites) via the keyless Jikan v4 API.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch an anime or manga character profile by MyAnimeList id: canonical name and favorites count. Backed by the keyless Jikan v4 API (MyAnimeList). Pass a MAL character id like 1 for Spike Spiegel.

title: FX Rate Time Series (Date Range)
description: Daily ECB reference exchange rates for a base/target pair across a date range. Source: Frankfurter (frankfurter.dev), ECB data, keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Historical daily FX time series between two currencies over a date range (path: YYYY-MM-DD..YYYY-MM-DD). Returns one rate per business day. Source: Frankfurter / ECB reference rates. Ideal for backtests and charts.

title: Trade As Percent Of GDP By Country
description: Trade (exports plus imports) as a percentage of GDP for a country over a year range. Indicator NE.TRD.GNFS.ZS. Source: World Bank Open Data, keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Trade openness: the sum of exports and imports of goods and services as a share of GDP (%) for any country/year range. World Bank indicator NE.TRD.GNFS.ZS. Pass ISO country code (path) plus optional date range.

title: US Marketable Debt Outstanding (MSPD)
description: Monthly Statement of the Public Debt summary: marketable securities outstanding by class (bills, notes, bonds). Source: US Treasury FiscalData API, keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Monthly Statement of the Public Debt (MSPD) summary table: amounts of marketable Treasury securities outstanding by class, split into debt held by the public vs intragovernmental holdings. Source: US Treasury FiscalData. Sorted newest first.

title: FDIC Bank Failures
description: Historical bank failure records (name, city/state, failure date) filtered by failure year. Data from the FDIC BankFind failures API.
descriptionBazaar: Query historical US bank failures by year. Returns failed institution name, city/state and failure date. Official FDIC BankFind failures dataset covering decades of bank closures. Useful for financial-risk research and crisis analysis.

title: EPA Facility Registry by State
description: EPA-regulated facilities (address, city, state) from the Facility Registry Service filtered by US state code. Data from EPA Envirofacts.
descriptionBazaar: Look up EPA-regulated facilities by US state from the Facility Registry Service (FRS). Returns location address, city and state for each facility. Official EPA Envirofacts data. Useful for environmental compliance mapping and site research.

title: Art Institute of Chicago Artist Roster
description: Returns a paginated list of artists/agents in the Art Institute of Chicago collection. Source: api.artic.edu.
descriptionBazaar: List artists/agents from the Art Institute of Chicago collection with pagination. Returns names and agent IDs you can then resolve to full detail. Keyless open-access museum API.

title: Met Museum Objects By Department
description: Returns the list of object IDs in a given Metropolitan Museum of Art department. Source: collectionapi.metmuseum.org.
descriptionBazaar: List all object IDs belonging to a Metropolitan Museum of Art department (by departmentIds). Returns total count and objectID array for paging through a department's holdings. Keyless museum open-access API.

title: MusicBrainz Label Search
description: Searches the MusicBrainz open music database for record labels by name and returns matches with type and area. Source: musicbrainz.org.
descriptionBazaar: Search MusicBrainz for record labels by name. Returns matches with label name, type, area and MBID. Keyless (sends a User-Agent). Useful for music-industry research and label-catalog datasets.

title: Wikiquote Page Summary
description: Returns the REST summary (title, description, extract) for a Wikiquote page by title. Source: en.wikiquote.org.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch the Wikiquote REST summary for a page (e.g. Albert_Einstein). Returns title, displaytitle and a plaintext extract describing the subject. Keyless (sends a User-Agent). Useful for quotation-source context and author lookups.

sampleResponse.title: Albert Einstein
sampleResponse.extract: Albert Einstein was a Jewish German theoretical physicist, widely acknowledged to be one of the greatest physicists.

title: Terrain Elevation by Coordinate
description: Returns the terrain elevation in meters for a lat/lng point from the Open-Meteo Elevation API (Copernicus DEM), as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Terrain elevation for any coordinate from Open-Meteo's Copernicus DEM based elevation API. Returns elevation in meters. Keyless, global, fast. Useful for mapping, hydrology, routing and geospatial enrichment.

title: GBIF Occurrence Counts by Country
description: Returns GBIF occurrence record counts grouped by country for a given publishing country, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Aggregate GBIF occurrence counts by country for a chosen publishing country. Keyless. Useful for biodiversity data-coverage analysis and comparing observation effort across nations.

title: UK Postcode Details
description: Returns full administrative and geographic detail for a UK postcode (region, district, ward, coordinates) via the keyless postcodes.io API.
descriptionBazaar: Resolve a UK postcode to its full record: country, region, admin district, ward, parliamentary constituency, eastings/northings, and lat/long. Free postcodes.io data covering all of Great Britain.

title: US Address Geocoder
description: Geocodes a one-line US street address to coordinates and matched address via the keyless US Census Bureau geocoder.
descriptionBazaar: Geocode a full US street address to latitude/longitude with the official matched address and TIGER line metadata. Authoritative US Census Bureau geocoder, no key required. Pass a one-line address string.

title: Pokemon Move Lookup
description: Returns combat stats for a Pokemon move (power, pp, accuracy, type, damage class) from PokeAPI.
descriptionBazaar: Get the battle stats of any Pokemon move: power, PP, accuracy, elemental type and damage class (physical/special/status). Backed by PokeAPI. Pass a move slug like flamethrower.

title: iNaturalist Taxa Search
description: Searches iNaturalist taxa by free-text query and returns matching taxa with rank and identifiers, as JSON.
descriptionBazaar: Search iNaturalist's taxonomy by free text to resolve common or scientific names to taxa with rank, ancestry and photos. Keyless. Great for naturalist apps and species autocomplete.

title: Cleveland Museum of Art Search
description: Full-text search over the Cleveland Museum of Art open-access collection, returning matching artworks with creators and type. Source: openaccess-api.clevelandart.org.
descriptionBazaar: Search the Cleveland Museum of Art open-access collection by free-text query. Returns artworks with title, creators, type and CC0 image rights. Keyless. Useful for art discovery and dataset building.

title: FDIC State Banking Summary
description: Aggregate banking statistics (total assets by state) for a given year. Data from the FDIC BankFind summary API.
descriptionBazaar: Retrieve aggregate state-level banking summaries for a given year. Returns total assets per state for FDIC-insured institutions. Official FDIC aggregate data, useful for macro banking comparisons and state economic research.

title: EPA Toxics Release Facilities by State
description: Toxics Release Inventory (TRI) facilities (name, address, county) filtered by US state. Data from EPA Envirofacts.
descriptionBazaar: Find EPA Toxics Release Inventory (TRI) facilities by US state. Returns facility id, name, street address, city, county and zip. Official EPA Envirofacts data. Useful for tracking industrial chemical-release sites and environmental risk research.

sampleResponse.facility_name: HANSON PIPE & PRODUCTS INC MANASSAS PLANT

title: Cleveland Museum of Art Artwork Detail
description: Returns full catalog detail for one Cleveland Museum of Art artwork by numeric ID, including title, creation date, and type. Source: openaccess-api.clevelandart.org.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch one Cleveland Museum of Art artwork by numeric ID. Returns title, creation_date, type, accession number and CC0 rights. Keyless open-access museum API. Useful for enriching art references.

id.description: Cleveland Museum of Art artwork numeric ID
